title: alpinia orthostachys
intro: Alpinia orthostachys, also known as the golden trumpet, is a species of flowering plant in the ginger family (Zingiberaceae). It is native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Alpinia orthostachys include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes and leaves are often dried, powdered, and used in teas, capsules, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
